features: Adds vibrant and bold colors to your hair for special occasions. Perfect for parties, festivals, and celebrations, making your look stand out. Easy to apply for instant, eye-catching results.
Each can contains 200ml of high-quality, long-lasting color. Provides full coverage and bright hues that stay vivid all day. Effortlessly washes out with shampoo for hassle-free removal.
Comes in a convenient 6-pack, offering a variety of colors for creative styling. Mix and match shades to achieve unique and fun looks. Ideal for sharing with friends or creating multiple looks.
Safe and gentle formula suitable for all hair types. Does not damage or dry out hair, ensuring a healthy shine. Dermatologically tested for safe use on all hair types.
description: Product description Transform your look with our 6-pack of vibrant Rainbow Colour Hair Spray, perfect for adding a splash of fun to any special occasion. Each 200ml can delivers bold, eye-catching color that turns heads and makes a statement. Ideal for parties, festivals, and celebrations, this hair spray is easy to apply and wash out. Elevate your style and embrace the excitement with dazzling hues that last all day and night. Directions [INF] Shake the can, hold 8-12 inches from hair, spray evenly Safety Warning Avoid contact with eyes See more

specifications_table.Benefits: Temporary color and style enhancement for special occasions or fun experimentation
